conflict: the archive itself and the shame of telling other people what happened
consequence: Private humiliation becomes social fact, and Lena can no longer process the injury alone.
must_land_beats: Lena backscrolls through enough material to feel the scale of the fabrication.
Sexual memory curdles under forensic rereading.
Farah becomes a witness who believes Lena without condescension.
Telling Gabe or family expands the damage because the lie had already entered communal life.
pressure_source: the archive itself and the shame of telling other people what happened
